name: Chicken Velvet Soup (Janice Norman)
recipeInstructions:
1. Make cream sauce by blending the butter and flour in a medium saucepan over low heat until smooth.
2. Warm the milk (or light cream) in a separate pan.
3. Gradually add the warm milk or cream to the butter-flour mixture, stirring constantly, until well combined.
4. Stir in 1 cup of hot chicken broth and continue cooking until heated through and blended, about 4 minutes.
5. Add an additional 2 cups of hot chicken broth and the finely chopped chicken.
6. Season with salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste.
7. Heat the soup to serving temperature—steaming but not boiling—to prevent the cream from separating.
8. Serve immediately from a heated tureen, ladling into warmed bowls, and garnish with snippets of fresh parsley.
Makes approximately 8 servings.
